headline: Spectrum makes significant decision as customer losses mount
summary: Spectrum, which is owned by Charter Communications, has decided to make another significant workforce change as it continues to battle mounting customer losses in its cable TV and internet business. Charter revealed in its latest earnings report that Spectrum lost 120,000 internet customers and ...
